metadata.description: Forge — browser-automation agent team for Claude Code

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Browser-automation agent team for Claude Code — drive tasks end-to-end against an ephemeral chromium session, accrete reusable snippets, teach forge new flows turn-by-turn, compose verified Playwright specs, and re-run specs on demand for paired before/after evidence. Project-specific conventions (accounts, env handling, setup) are documented in forge/hints/ rather than baked into forge.
